questionHtml: Suggest reasons for the difference in end of day starch concentrations in stage 2 (S2) for the plants grown in long days and short days.
markschemeHtml:
a. leaves in plants grown in long day receive longer period of light / more leaf surface area so more photosynthesis occurs resulting in more starch. Accept vice versa.

b. plants in short days using starch to produce more leaves/for growth/S2 a period of rapid increase in number of leaves. Accept vice versa.

meta.title: Suggest reasons for the difference in end of day starch concentrations in stage 2 (S2) for the plants grown in long days and short days.
